description: Negative fixture cases for the optional-surface qualification gate. Each case is a complete register that is structurally valid except for one targeted flaw; ci/check_optional_surface_qualification.py loads it and asserts validation rejects it with the expected check id.

cases.summary: A surface with no stable qualification packet is rendered qualified instead of narrowing below the cutline.
A qualified surface rides a qualification packet whose freshness-SLO state is breached.
A surface records a claim label wider than the stable claim manifest publishes for its backing claim.
